prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `72a961c9`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 task package for `72a961c9` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_72a961c9/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_72a961c9/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_72a961c9/generator.py#L23). The rule is: keep the horizontal `1` bar unchanged, and for each marker, grow an upward column in the same position, with `2` producing `2,1,1,1` and `8` producing `8,1,1`. The Opus hint was used as a starting point and matched the official examples; the Sonnet summary was also consistent, so no `notes.md` was needed. The generator stays on-family by sampling a full-width lower bar, sparse non-adjacent `2`/`8` markers, and varying headroom/bottom padding. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `5/5`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the shared builder produced [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/72a961c9/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/72a961c9/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/72a961c9/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/72a961c9/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/72a961c9/previews/preview_03.png).
